Package audio

Class AudioManager

java.lang.Object
audio.AudioManager
public class AudioManager extends Object
The AudioManager serves as the centralized controller for all audio playback.

It categorizes audio into two main types:

  • Sound Effects (SFX): Short, low-latency sounds managed via AudioClip. Multiple SFX can play simultaneously without interrupting each other.
  • Music: Long, streaming tracks managed via MediaPlayer. Only one music track plays at a time, supporting looping and volume fading.

  • Method Details

    • playSFXWithModifierSet

      public static void playSFXWithModifierSet(HashSet<Modifier> modSet)
      Analyzes a set of modifiers and plays the corresponding sound effects.

      This is typically called when a card interacts with a tile containing multiple modifiers, ensuring each logic change has a distinct auditory cue. * @param modSet A set of Modifier instances to play sounds for.

    • playSoundEffect

      public static void playSoundEffect(String name)
      Plays a pre-loaded sound effect by its filename.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the sound file (without extension).

    • playMusic

      public static void playMusic(String name)
      Transitions the background music to the specified track.

      If the requested track is already playing, this method does nothing. Otherwise, it stops the current track, disposes of its resources, and loops the new track. * @param name The name of the music track to play.
